sentence: I _____ my homework yet, so I really can't go out to play right now.
explanation: yet 常與現在完成式連用，表示「到目前為止尚未」完成，故用 haven't finished。

sentence: The window _____ by the strong wind during last night's heavy storm.
explanation: 窗戶是動作的承受者（被風吹破），且為過去事件，故用過去被動 was broken。

sentence: The girl _____ won the speech contest last week is my best friend.
explanation: 先行詞 girl 是人，且在關係子句中當主詞，故用主格關係代名詞 who。

sentence: This box is much _____ than that one, so I can't carry it by myself.
explanation: than 表比較，heavy 為單音節形容詞，比較級加 -er 為 heavier；much 用來修飾比較級。

sentence: _____ it was raining very hard, the players kept practicing on the field.
explanation: 前後語意轉折（雖然下大雨，仍繼續練習），用表讓步的連接詞 Although。

sentence: My father enjoys _____ in the river near our house every summer morning.
explanation: enjoy 後面接動名詞 V-ing 當受詞，故用 swimming。

sentence: While I _____ dinner in the kitchen, the telephone suddenly rang.
explanation: while 引導一個正在進行的動作，期間發生另一件事，故用過去進行式 was cooking。

sentence: The movie was so _____ that some young children started to cry in the theater.
explanation: 修飾事物且「使人害怕」用現在分詞 frightening；frightened 是人「感到害怕」，主詞是 movie 故用 frightening。

sentence: I have a classmate _____ father is a well-known doctor in our city.
explanation: 表示「同學的父親」這種所有關係，用所有格關係代名詞 whose。

sentence: Mount Jade is the _____ mountain in Taiwan, and many people hope to climb it.
explanation: in Taiwan 表示在某範圍內「最…」，用最高級 the highest。

sentence: She went to the library _____ some reference books for her science report.
explanation: 表示「為了…」的目的，用不定詞 to borrow。

sentence: A brand-new bridge _____ next year to connect the two small mountain villages.
explanation: 橋是被建造的（被動），且時間在未來，故用未來被動 will be built。
